response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and strong problem-solving skills, but lacks direct experience with modern C++/Rust and geospatial routing systems. His expertise in Dlang, Node.js, and TypeScript doesn't fully align with the required technologies (C++, Rust, Linux server apps, geospatial data). However, his background in low-latency systems, distributed architectures, and open-source contributions suggests adaptability.
strengths: Experience with low-latency, high-performance systems (Dlang, Node.js)
concerns: No demonstrated C++/Rust experience for routing pipeline development
Limited direct exposure to geospatial data processing or navigation systems
Career focus has been broader (full-stack, AI, embedded) rather than specialized in routing/tiling
